title: Update imagebuilder dependency to support heading ARGs in Dockerfile
body:
Add support for leading `ARG` (`ARG` before a `FROM`). 

Marking as `WIP` as it depdends on https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/105 (Edited: Also depends on https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/104).

/cc @rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat 

Signed-off-by: Vincent Demeester <vdemeest@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

bot, add author to whitelist
bot, test pull request
Test issues don't appear to be related, but are hopefully fixed with #1129.  You may need to rebase after that lands.
@vdemeester https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/104 has merged, can do you have time to wrap this up?
@TomSweeneyRedHat yeah will look into it today :wink:
LGTM @vdemeester Thanks again for working through this,   Very nice change overall.

Interesting, this is broking some conformance tests it seems…
EDIT: oh… nevermind, I'm just dumb :joy_cat: I forgot an arg in the `bud.bats` test…
Can you fix the typo in your commit message.  `depdency`
@vdemeester Looks like your tests are failing?
@vdemeester Do you have a chance to work on this.  We would like to get this in so we could make a new release.  If you don't we will take it over and drive it to completion.
@vdemeester thanks for wrapping this up.  LGTM and happy green test buttons.
